=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:24-5:68) TS377056: `Context.Service` is assigned to a variable here, but this API is intended for a class declaration shape such as `class Preview extends Context.Service<Preview, { port: number }>()("Preview") {}`. effect(serviceNotAsClass)
  Fix 0: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to class declaration"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Convert to class declaration" ===

--- file:///.src/serviceNotAsClass_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics serviceNotAsClass:warning
import { Context } from "effect"

export class Preview extends Context.Service<Preview, {
    port: number;
}>()("Preview") {}
